generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuator integrated into building infrastructure for executing control commands (e.g., lighting, HVAC) based on digital twin directives. Enabled by bidirectional communication via Eclipse Ditto middleware."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized actuator for adaptive lighting systems that implements reinforcement learning policies for visual comfort optimization. Synchronized with digital twin control models via Ditto service endpoints."
]

instance HVACZoneControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Zone-level HVAC controller actuator that adjusts temperature, humidity, and airflow based on real-time sensor data processed through the digital twin system."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision IoT temperature sensor deployed in building infrastructure for real-time environmental monitoring. Integrated with BIM model via semantic annotations and connected to Eclipse Hono for data ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RelativeHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor capturing real-time moisture levels in building environments. Semantically linked to BIM elements and connected through Eclipse Hono middleware for bidirectional synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Presence detection sensor using IoT technology to monitor occupancy patterns in building spaces. Data integrated with BIM model via semantic annotations and processed through Eclipse Hono for real-time updates."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meter capturing real-time energy consumption data from building systems. Connected to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and semantically enriched in BIM models for comprehensive energy analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RelativeHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically annotated BIM model enriched with device metadata (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) and control logic (lighting policies, HVAC setpoints) for runtime integration with physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoServiceOrchestrator, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime reinforcement learning model for adaptive building systems (e.g., BOREALIS lighting system) integrated as a service within the digital twin architecture."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoServiceOrchestrator, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature telemetry stream processed from IoT sensors and integrated with visualization and analytics services."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance OccupancyPatternData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed occupancy data streams used for space utilization analytics and predictive maintenance recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance EnergyPerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated energy consumption metrics derived from smart meter data, used for performance benchmarking and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model implemented in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring of building operations and real-time data visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoIoTConnectivity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT connectivity middleware providing real-time data ingestion and bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance EclipseDittoServiceOrchestrator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented middleware for telemetry management, event-driven updates, and service orchestration within the digital twin architecture."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform enabling interactive monitoring of building operations through real-time data integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, InteractiveMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MDE framework for automated extraction of semantics from BIM models and generation of runtime artifacts (REST APIs, MQTT endpoints, Ditto services)."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelEnrichmentService, RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance BIMSoftwareRevit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling software (Revit) used for initial modeling and enrichment of BIM models with runtime configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelEnrichmentService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing continuous monitoring of building operations through real-time data streams and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationMonitoringInsight, AnomalyDetectionAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for predictive analytics of energy consumption, equipment failures, and occupancy trends."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing model-driven control policies for adaptive building systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyOptimizationInsight, AutomaticAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization of building performance metrics and KPIs through Unreal Engine integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceVisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing energy performance data to provide optimization recommendations for facility management."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsRecommendationAction
]

instance BIMModelEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the enrichment of BIM models with device metadata and control logic using MDE tools."
    DTDFVocab:provides SemanticEnrichmentInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from IoT devices via Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing bidirectional communication between physical systems and digital twin via Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommunicationStatusInsight
]

instance ControlPolicyExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing control policies generated by reinforcement learning models."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyExecutionInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time visualization capabilities through Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationUpdateInsight
]

instance InteractiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling interactive monitoring of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringFeedbackInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts from BIM models using MDE tools."
    DTDFVocab:provides ArtifactGenerationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and monitoring of building operational status including environmental conditions and system performance."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated detection of deviations from expected behavior (sensor failures, energy spikes) with proactive alerting."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive forecast of energy consumption patterns based on historical and real-time data streams."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated suggestions for predictive maintenance based on equipment health analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlPolicyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for building control policies (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) based on reinforcement learning."
]

instance AutomaticAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated execution of control adjustments to physical systems based on digital twin directives."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building performance metrics through Unreal Engine integration."
]

instance EnergySavingsRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggestions for energy-saving measures based on consumption analysis and optimization models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SemanticEnrichmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful semantic annotation and integration of physical components within BIM models."
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful data ingestion from IoT devices."
]

instance CommunicationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of bidirectional communication channels between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance PolicyExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful execution of control policies."
]

instance VisualizationUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful visualization updates."
]

instance MonitoringFeedbackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Feedback from interactive monitoring sessions."
]

instance ArtifactGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of successful generation of runtime artifacts."
]

// C12: Environments/Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all IoT sensors, actuators, and control systems integrated with the digital twin."
    base:contains PermafrostTemperatureSensor, RelativeHumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionMeter, BuildingControlSystemActuator, AdaptiveLightingActuator, HVACZoneControllerActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment containing all digital twin models, services, and enablers for building operations management."
    base:contains EnrichedBIMModel, ReinforcementLearningControlModel, UnrealEngineVisualizationModel, EclipseHonoIoTConnectivity, EclipseDittoServiceOrchestrator, ModelDrivenEngineeringTool, BIMSoftwareRevit
]

// System Under Study
instance BuildingDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "BIM-based Digital Twin system for building infrastructure monitoring, simulation, and life-cycle optimization."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment, DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves **control logic and commands generated by the DT**, which are sent back to the physical system via Ditto and Eclipse Hono. The framework supports **automated commissioning** and **runtime adjustments** (e.g., adaptive lighting policies, energy optimization) based on real-time analytics. The BIM model defines the **control semantics** (e.g., device configurations, tenant-specific rules), which are transformed into runtime artifacts (e.g., RESTful APIs or MQTT endpoints) for seamless interaction with physical actuators. This interaction is **real-time and bidirectional**, ensuring continuous synchronization between the virtual and physical systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates on **real-time intervals**, with data synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second granularity** to support adaptive control and predictive analytics. The framework ensures **low-latency communication** via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, enabling near-instantaneous updates between the physical and virtual domains. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization, ensuring the DT reflects the physical system’s state with minimal delay."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The foundational semantic model enriched with runtime configurations.
   - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (connectivity) and Ditto (service orchestration) for real-time data exchange.
   - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D monitoring.
   - **Control Layer**: Custom services (e.g., adaptive lighting, energy optimization) integrated via standardized APIs.
   - **Extension Points**: Pluggable modules for **custom analytics, predictive maintenance, or domain-specific services**.
   The constellation supports **bidirectional synchronization** between physical and virtual systems, ensuring **real-time alignment** and **scalable deployment** across infrastructure projects."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages of the building**, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During the **design phase**, the BIM model serves as the foundational representation, enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic). In the **construction phase**, the DT supports **automated commissioning** of physical systems. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control**. The framework also supports **post-occupancy evaluation**, where sensor data is used to refine control policies (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment between physical and virtual systems** by measuring synchronization accuracy and data consistency.
   - **Validation mechanisms**: **Model validation** (e.g., checking BIM semantics) and **runtime verification** (e.g., sensor data consistency checks).
   - **Uncertainty handling**: The framework accounts for **sensor noise, latency, and semantic drift** via **real-time data reconciliation** and **adaptive control policies**.
   - **Verification**: **Automated testing** of runtime artifacts (e.g., Ditto service deployments) to ensure correctness before integration with physical systems."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for lightweight IoT connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for standardized data exchange protocols. Communication occurs via **RESTful APIs** and **MQTT endpoints**, enabling bidirectional telemetry between the physical and virtual domains. The middleware supports **JSON-based payloads** for interoperability with heterogeneous systems. Network protocols are optimized for **low-latency, high-reliability** synchronization, though specific transport layers (e.g., TCP/IP) are not explicitly mentioned."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed using a **scalable, artifact-driven approach** that leverages **model-driven engineering (MDE)** to generate deployable components. The framework supports **cloud or edge deployment** (though specific infrastructure details like Docker/Kubernetes are not mentioned), ensuring **low-overhead updates** and **modular scalability**. The **Unreal Engine** visualization layer may require **high-performance computing resources** for interactive 3D rendering. The deployment process is **automated**, reducing manual intervention and enabling **reproducible DT setups** across projects. The **standardized extension points** facilitate integration with existing IT infrastructure (e.g., facility management systems)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized Extension Points**: Enable seamless connection to **third-party analytics, IoT platforms, or external DTs**.
   - **Interoperability with AECO Standards**: Aligns with **BIM and MDE** for cross-disciplinary collaboration.
   - **Modular Service Architecture**: Facilitates integration with **custom plugins** or **domain-specific tools** (e.g., energy management systems).
   The framework does not explicitly mention **IFC, REST, or MQTT** as mandatory standards but emphasizes **plug-and-play compatibility** for heterogeneous systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM (Building Information Modeling)**: Semantic foundation for geometric, spatial, and functional data.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Framework for automated model-to-model and model-to-text transformations.
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**: Standardized middleware for IoT connectivity and data exchange.
   The framework does not explicitly reference **IFC, OMA LWM2M, or IoT connectivity protocols** as mandatory standards, though it aligns with **AECO-specific interoperability requirements**."
]
